title: 10 best herbal teas for migraine
description: Lavandula angustifolia, also known as English lavender, teas helps with migraine because of its calming and anti-inflammatory properties. The tea contains compounds like linalool and linalyl acetate, which have been shown to reduce inflammation and relax muscles, thereby alleviating migraine symptoms.
